message:
fix: XSS hardening, Three.js memory leaks, test coverage, and minor corrections

- json-ld.tsx: escape > and & in JSON-LD serialization to prevent XSS
  injection via structured data (was only escaping <)
- header-icon-3d.tsx: memoize geometries and materials in MicroBreathingSphere,
  MicroPyramid, MicroMobius, and MicroKlein components and dispose them on
  unmount to fix Three.js memory leaks
- copy-button.tsx: add missing "use client" directive
- stats-grid.test.tsx: add comprehensive unit tests for parseStatValue covering
  simple numbers, K/M/B suffixes, currency prefixes, comma-separated numbers,
  and non-animatable fallback strings
- nvidia-story/page.tsx: use dynamic dropDate from data instead of hardcoded
  dateModified string in article schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ const articleSchema = {

   headline: "The $600B Drop: How a Blog Post Moved Markets",

-  dateModified: "2025-01-27",
+  dateModified: nvidiaStoryData.stats.dropDate,
   description: nvidiaStoryData.hero.subheadline,
